course.name: Introduction to Music Theory
course.description: Learn the basics of music theory, including scales, chords, and rhythm.

course.name: Advanced Composition Techniques
course.description: Explore advanced techniques in music composition and arrangement.

course.name: Music Production with Digital Audio Workstations
course.description: Learn how to produce music using popular digital audio workstations (DAWs).

course.name: History of Western Music
course.description: Study the history and development of Western music from the Middle Ages to the present.

course.name: Jazz Improvisation
course.description: Learn the art of jazz improvisation and develop your own unique style.

course.name: Film Scoring
course.description: Discover the techniques and processes involved in scoring music for film and television.
